'''Berin B'naian''' was a [[Coruscant Customs Bureau|Coruscant Customs]] [[Police officer/Legends|officer]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was one of the hostages taken during the [[Galactic City spaceport hostage siege]].
